title.en: But not yet, his combat power is not enough.

content.en:
Ye Tian also never expected that an item he had obtained from a third realm relic a long time ago would be the biggest opportunity he had maintained so far.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian used this dimensional treasure to comprehend the rules of the dimension, and at the same time used various resources to improve his two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, striving to raise these two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies to the fourth level of the Dacheng realm.

As for cultivation, you can only take it slowly, and you can't improve it quickly.

When it comes to the fifth realm, it is too difficult to improve one's cultivation, and there are almost no resources suitable for the fifth realm to improve one's cultivation in the four thousand realms, and only during the multi-dimensional tribulation, there is such a source.

Although Ye Tian had obtained the assets of the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord, there were not many such resources, and it would take a long time to raise his cultivation to the middle of the Fifth Realm.

After Ye Tian was going to raise the dimensional rules, he would go to the inheritance land of the Wumu Realm Lord, and use the fourth realm cultivation to get away all the good things in those inheritance places.

When the time comes, even if it is the instrument spirit of the inheritance land, it may not be able to help him and kill him.

But not yet, his combat power is not enough.

......

This side of the 4,000th Territory.

The Fourth Realm of the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance often contacted Ye Tian, but Ye Tian did not go to see them on the grounds of retreat.

He only wants to improve his strength now, and the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance is currently not helping him much.

And he also gave enough benefits to the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance, and he didn't owe them anything.

And with the passage of time, the internal chaos of the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance is also relatively chaotic, and internal assassinations often occur.

This kind of casual cultivation alliance, this kind of thing is too normal.

Time flies.

A million extradimensional epochs have passed.

Taking advantage of such a long time, Ye Tian finally comprehended the rules of the dual dimension, and his strength skyrocketed.

At the same time, he was preparing to fuse two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies.

He is ready to fuse the Ka Ye Wisdom Body and the Ten Dimensional Celestial Body, once the fusion is successful, it will directly expand his dimensional body, and it also contains the characteristics of these two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies.

I saw that Ye Tian integrated the wisdom body of the Jiaye into a dimension, and then into the dimensional body, and gradually turned into a part of the dimensional body, and then fused with the ten-dimensional celestial body.

Gradually, the ten-dimensional celestial bodies also became part of the dimensional body.

Rumble!!!!!!

His dimensional body began to transform, and his body became stronger and stronger.

It took a long time for this transformation to complete.

Of course, he can continue to improve the ten-dimensional celestial body now, but the growth is still the ten-dimensional celestial body.

"The strength of the body is at least several times that of the past, and the dimensional body after fusing the innate multi-dimensional Dao body is too powerful!"

Ye Tian also truly realized that for the Fifth Realm, the dimensional rules were the most important, as long as the dimensional rules were strong, more and more innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies could be fused, and the strength would become stronger and stronger.

Of course, there is a limit to the innate multi-dimensional Dao of fusion, but it is not easy to reach this limit.

......

Terran.

Ye Xingchen came to Ye Tian's side.

"Father, I have already raised my cultivation to the peak of the fourth realm!" Ye Xingchen came to report his cultivation results.

Ye Tian nodded with satisfaction, he gave his son a lot of resources, so the other party's cultivation was naturally and quickly.

In addition, Ye Tian also gave Ye Xingchen a lot of treasures that assisted in extradimensional rules, but Ye Xingchen could only comprehend them routinely, and the effect of comprehension was not very fast, and he had only comprehended more than 10,000 extradimensional rules so far.

Ye Tian was going to find a way to raise his soul will to the ninth dimension after Ye Xingchen comprehended the thirty thousand extradimensional rules, and then gave some treasures to assist in impacting the fifth realm, so that his impact would become the fifth realm.

And his wife and daughter are the same, but their progress is not as fast as Ye Xingchen.

Of course, this kind of quick-track fifth realm is only the weakest fifth realm.

But Ye Tian doesn't have high requirements for Ye Xingchen, just be able to become the fifth realm.

He can't let his son sharpen a few multi-dimensional tribulation times and impact the fifth realm with the most perfect foundation, right?

But how can there be this time now, in a few hundred million extradimensional eras, the death multidimensional catastrophe is coming, and it is normal for all to fall at that time, so he wants to let his son grow up as soon as possible, and at least add a little more hope of life at that time.

In the years that followed, the major territories were in disarray.

In order to quickly improve their strength, many forces have frantically developed ruins everywhere, killing everywhere, and there are even many Fourth Realms that have broken into the Territory of Five Thousand from the side of the Fourth Thousand, wanting to find possible opportunities from here.

As a result, many of the territories on the 500th Frontier have suffered.

this day.

A fourth realm with the third day level combat power came to the side of the 5,000th territory, and directly wanted to collect a lot of resources, and seeing that the human race was strong, he directly killed it.

He didn't find out much about the Terran at all, and he didn't know that the Terran had given birth to a Fifth Realm, if he knew, where would he dare to come to the Terran!

And when he was about to suppress the human race, a pair of pupils locked on to the fourth realm through the tenth dimension.

"The fifth realm, no, the seniors spare their lives!!"

Rumble!

This Fourth Realm was directly reduced to ashes.

After another period of time, the Terrans reported a message below.

"Ancestor, I have detected that many of the Red Flame Dragon Clan are heading towards the more than six thousand territories!"

A third realm came to report.

"Red Flame Dragon!"

Ye Tian suddenly thought of this guy Tricky Wood Red Dragon, the other party should have broken through to the fourth realm, maybe he had returned to the Red Flame Dragon Clan.

Now, all the major forces are vying for resources, and this guy must have informed the Red Flame Dragon Clan of the inheritance of the Wumu Realm Lord.

Therefore, the Red Flame Dragon Clan will send many extradimensional realms to the place where the Lord of the Wumu Realm inherits, and even has the intention of occupying it.

Ye Tian was ready to occupy the inheritance land of the Wumu Realm, so he couldn't help the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

Swish!

Ye Tian's duplicate body rushed to the territory of 6611, although the inheritance place had moved its location, but it was still on the edge of this territory, he quickly locked it, and then waited for the arrival of the strong man of the Red Flame Dragon Clan.

Soon after, the powerhouse of the Red Flame Dragon Clan came.

And Ye Tian looked at it and found the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, the other party not only broke through to the fourth realm, but also reached the middle stage of the fourth realm.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon also saw Ye Tian and was immediately shocked.

Because Ye Tian's cultivation actually reached the fifth realm two!.
